title: secretx-hashicorp-vault: implement HashiCorp Vault backend
description: Implement SecretStore for HashiCorp Vault KV v2. URI: secretx://vault/<mount>/<path>. Server address from VAULT_ADDR env var or ?addr= query param. Token auth from VAULT_TOKEN env var; AppRole auth configurable. get() calls kv2::read. put() calls kv2::set. refresh() bypasses cache. Dep: secretx-core, vaultrs. Integration tests via official vault Docker image.
